scan_table_check.description: A custom table that is directly or indirectly derived from "task" must override the configuration of the "number" column to be read-only. The task number should serve as an immutable ID to be used in various places during and after the process. Allowing to edit it, fails this intention. It is yet unclear why the field is not configured read-only OOTB.
scan_table_check.name: CodeSanity - Number field is read-only
scan_table_check.resolution_details: Add a dictionary override record for the derived table (with base table "task") for the "number" field configuring the field to be read-only.
scan_table_check.short_description: Custom task tables set number to read-only
